title: CVE-2025-41266: Nozomi Networks Labs Improper Neutralization
summary: [P2] CVE-2025-41266 is a vulnerability in Nozomi Networks Labs that allows for improper neutralization of special elements, which can lead to code execution. There is no available patch for this vulnerability, and it has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.60)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for code execution, which is a key characteristic of rce.
